$b = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\('C:\\Users\\user\\Documents\\new\\build\\screen.ppm'\)
$h = 16

function px\($x, $y\) {
    $o = $h + \($y * 1024 + $x\) * 3
    $r = $b[$o]; $g = $b[$o+1]; $bl = $b[$o+2]
    Write-Output "  \($x,$y\) = #$\("{0:X2}{1:X2}{2:X2}" -f $r, $g, $bl\)"
}

px 32 25

px 32 50
px 24 32
px 28 32

Bash(/tmp/test_vnc.ps1 << 'PSEOF'
$QEMU = 'C:\\Program Files\\qemu\\qemu-system-x86_64.exe'
$BUILD = 'C:\\Users\\user\\Documents\\new\\build'
$SERIAL = "$BUILD\\serial.log"

Remove-Item $SERIAL -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue

$proc = Start-Process -FilePath $QEMU -ArgumentList @\(
    '-bios', "$BUILD\\OVMF.fd",
    '-drive', "file=fat:rw:$BUILD\\esp",
    '-drive', "format=raw,file=$BUILD\\data.img,if=ide,index=1",
    '-m', '256M',
    '-vga', 'std',
    '-serial', "file:$SERIAL",
    '-no-reboot',
    '-monitor', 'telnet:127.0.0.1:4444,server,nowait',
    '-vnc', ':0'
\) -PassThru

Start-Sleep -Seconds 5

try {
    $client = New-Object System.Net.Sockets.TcpClient\('127.0.0.1', 4444\)
    $stream = $client.GetStream\(\)
    $writer = New-Object System.IO.StreamWriter\($stream\)
    $writer.AutoFlush = $true
    Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 500
    
    # Read some memory from backbuffer to verify it's populated
    $writer.WriteLine\('xp /4wx 0x400000'\)
    Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 500
    
    # Read from framebuffer  
    $writer.WriteLine\('xp /4wx 0x80000000'\)
    Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 500
    
    $writer.WriteLine\('screendump build/screen2.ppm'\)
    Start-Sleep -Seconds 2
    
    # Read response
    $buf = New-Object byte[] 4096
    $stream.ReadTimeout = 2000
    try {
        $n = $stream.Read\($buf, 0, 4096\)
        $resp = [Text.Encoding]::ASCII.GetString\($buf, 0, $n\)
        Write-Host "Monitor response:"
        Write-Host $resp
    } catch {}
    
    $writer.WriteLine\('quit'\)
    Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 500
    $client.Close\(\)
} catch {
    Write-Host "Error: $_"
}

Start-Sleep -Seconds 2
if \(!$proc.HasExited\) { $proc.Kill\(\) }

Write-Host ""
Write-Host "=== SERIAL ==="
if \(Test-Path $SERIAL\) { Get-Content $SERIAL | Select-Object -Last 5 }
PSEOF)

Bash(/tmp/test_mouse.ps1 << 'PSEOF'
$QEMU = 'C:\\Program Files\\qemu\\qemu-system-x86_64.exe'
$BUILD = 'C:\\Users\\user\\Documents\\new\\build'
$SERIAL = "$BUILD\\serial.log"
Remove-Item $SERIAL -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue

$proc = Start-Process -FilePath $QEMU -ArgumentList @\(
    '-bios', "$BUILD\\OVMF.fd",
    '-drive', "file=fat:rw:$BUILD\\esp",
    '-drive', "format=raw,file=$BUILD\\data.img,if=ide,index=1",
    '-m', '256M',
    '-vga', 'std',
    '-serial', "file:$SERIAL",
    '-no-reboot',
    '-display', 'none',
    '-monitor', 'telnet:127.0.0.1:4444,server,nowait'
\) -PassThru

Start-Sleep -Seconds 5

try {
    $client = New-Object System.Net.Sockets.TcpClient\('127.0.0.1', 4444\)
    $stream = $client.GetStream\(\)
    $writer = New-Object System.IO.StreamWriter\($stream\)
    $writer.AutoFlush = $true
    Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 500

    # Send some mouse events
    $writer.WriteLine\('mouse_move 50 50'\)
    Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 200
    $writer.WriteLine\('mouse_move 50 50'\)
    Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 200
    $writer.WriteLine\('mouse_move 50 50'\)
    Start-Sleep -Seconds 1

    # Dump PIC masks
    $writer.WriteLine\('xp /1xb 0x21'\)
    Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 300
    $writer.WriteLine\('xp /1xb 0xA1'\)
    Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 300

    # Dump mouse_irq_count and mouse_moved and mouse_init_status
    # We need to find these addresses. Let's read known addresses.
    # mouse_init_status is at 0x500 \(written in init_ok\)
    $writer.WriteLine\('xp /1xb 0x500'\)
    Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 300

    # Read response
    $buf = New-Object byte[] 8192
    $stream.ReadTimeout = 2000
    try {
        $n = $stream.Read\($buf, 0, 8192\)
        $resp = [Text.Encoding]::ASCII.GetString\($buf, 0, $n\)
        Write-Host "Monitor:"
        Write-Host $resp
    } catch {}

    $writer.WriteLine\('quit'\)
    Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 500
    $client.Close\(\)
} catch {
    Write-Host "Error: $_"
}

Start-Sleep -Seconds 2
if \(!$proc.HasExited\) { $proc.Kill\(\) }

Write-Host ""
Write-Host "=== SERIAL ==="
if \(Test-Path $SERIAL\) { Get-Content $SERIAL | Select-Object -Last 3 }
PSEOF)

Bash(/tmp/test_mouse2.ps1 << 'PSEOF'
$QEMU = 'C:\\Program Files\\qemu\\qemu-system-x86_64.exe'
$BUILD = 'C:\\Users\\user\\Documents\\new\\build'
$SERIAL = "$BUILD\\serial.log"
Remove-Item $SERIAL -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue

$proc = Start-Process -FilePath $QEMU -ArgumentList @\(
    '-bios', "$BUILD\\OVMF.fd",
    '-drive', "file=fat:rw:$BUILD\\esp",
    '-drive', "format=raw,file=$BUILD\\data.img,if=ide,index=1",
    '-m', '256M',
    '-vga', 'std',
    '-serial', "file:$SERIAL",
    '-no-reboot',
    '-display', 'none',
    '-monitor', 'telnet:127.0.0.1:4444,server,nowait'
\) -PassThru

Start-Sleep -Seconds 5

try {
    $client = New-Object System.Net.Sockets.TcpClient\('127.0.0.1', 4444\)
    $stream = $client.GetStream\(\)
    $writer = New-Object System.IO.StreamWriter\($stream\)
    $writer.AutoFlush = $true
    Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 500

    # Check what input devices exist
    $writer.WriteLine\('info mice'\)
    Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 500

    # Read I/O port for PIC masks
    $writer.WriteLine\('inb 0x21'\)
    Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 300
    $writer.WriteLine\('inb 0xa1'\)
    Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 300

    # Read 8042 config byte: send 0x20 to port 0x64, read from 0x60
    $writer.WriteLine\('outb 0x64 0x20'\)
    Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 200
    $writer.WriteLine\('inb 0x60'\)
    Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 300

    $buf = New-Object byte[] 16384
    $stream.ReadTimeout = 3000
    try {
        $n = $stream.Read\($buf, 0, 16384\)
        $resp = [Text.Encoding]::ASCII.GetString\($buf, 0, $n\)
        # Strip ANSI escape sequences
        $clean = $resp -replace '\\x1b\\[[0-9;]*[a-zA-Z]', '' -replace '\\[K', '' -replace '\\[D', ''
        foreach \($line in \($clean -split "`n"\)\) {
            $line = $line.Trim\(\)
            if \($line -and $line -notmatch '^\\\(qemu\\\)\\s* -and $line -notmatch '^[a-z_]+\) {
                Write-Host $line
            }
        }
    } catch {}

    $writer.WriteLine\('quit'\)
    Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 500
    $client.Close\(\)
} catch {
    Write-Host "Error: $_"
}

Start-Sleep -Seconds 2
if \(!$proc.HasExited\) { $proc.Kill\(\) }
PSEOF)

Bash(/tmp/test_mouse3.ps1 << 'PSEOF'
$QEMU = 'C:\\Program Files\\qemu\\qemu-system-x86_64.exe'
$BUILD = 'C:\\Users\\user\\Documents\\new\\build'
$SERIAL = "$BUILD\\serial.log"
Remove-Item $SERIAL -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue

$proc = Start-Process -FilePath $QEMU -ArgumentList @\(
    '-bios', "$BUILD\\OVMF.fd",
    '-drive', "file=fat:rw:$BUILD\\esp",
    '-drive', "format=raw,file=$BUILD\\data.img,if=ide,index=1",
    '-m', '256M',
    '-vga', 'std',
    '-serial', "file:$SERIAL",
    '-no-reboot',
    '-display', 'none',
    '-monitor', 'telnet:127.0.0.1:4444,server,nowait'
\) -PassThru

Start-Sleep -Seconds 5

try {
    $client = New-Object System.Net.Sockets.TcpClient\('127.0.0.1', 4444\)
    $stream = $client.GetStream\(\)
    $writer = New-Object System.IO.StreamWriter\($stream\)
    $writer.AutoFlush = $true
    Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 500

    $writer.WriteLine\('info mice'\)
    Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 500

    # Send mouse events to PS/2 mouse
    $writer.WriteLine\('mouse_move 100 100'\)
    Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 200
    $writer.WriteLine\('mouse_move 100 100'\)
    Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 200
    $writer.WriteLine\('mouse_move 100 100'\)
    Start-Sleep -Seconds 1

    # Check mouse_irq_count - find its address
    # Let's just dump memory around where mouse data section would be
    $writer.WriteLine\('info mice'\)
    Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 500

    $buf = New-Object byte[] 16384
    $stream.ReadTimeout = 3000
    try {
        $n = $stream.Read\($buf, 0, 16384\)
        $resp = [Text.Encoding]::ASCII.GetString\($buf, 0, $n\)
        foreach \($line in \($resp -split "`n"\)\) {
            $line = $line.Trim\(\)
            if \($line -match 'Mouse|mouse|qemu'\) {
                Write-Host $line
            }
        }
    } catch {}

    $writer.WriteLine\('quit'\)
    Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 500
    $client.Close\(\)
} catch {
    Write-Host "Error: $_"
}

Start-Sleep -Seconds 2
if \(!$proc.HasExited\) { $proc.Kill\(\) }

Write-Host ""
Write-Host "=== SERIAL ==="
if \(Test-Path $SERIAL\) { Get-Content $SERIAL | Select-Object -Last 3 }
PSEOF)

Bash(/tmp/test_irq.ps1 << 'PSEOF'
$QEMU = 'C:\\Program Files\\qemu\\qemu-system-x86_64.exe'
$BUILD = 'C:\\Users\\user\\Documents\\new\\build'
$SERIAL = "$BUILD\\serial.log"
Remove-Item $SERIAL -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue

$proc = Start-Process -FilePath $QEMU -ArgumentList @\(
    '-bios', "$BUILD\\OVMF.fd",
    '-drive', "file=fat:rw:$BUILD\\esp",
    '-drive', "format=raw,file=$BUILD\\data.img,if=ide,index=1",
    '-m', '256M',
    '-vga', 'std',
    '-serial', "file:$SERIAL",
    '-no-reboot',
    '-display', 'none',
    '-monitor', 'telnet:127.0.0.1:4444,server,nowait'
\) -PassThru

Start-Sleep -Seconds 4

try {
    $client = New-Object System.Net.Sockets.TcpClient\('127.0.0.1', 4444\)
    $stream = $client.GetStream\(\)
    $writer = New-Object System.IO.StreamWriter\($stream\)
    $writer.AutoFlush = $true
    Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 500

    # Send mouse events
    $writer.WriteLine\('mouse_move 50 50'\)
    Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 300
    $writer.WriteLine\('mouse_move 50 50'\)
    Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 300
    $writer.WriteLine\('mouse_move 50 50'\)
    Start-Sleep -Seconds 2

    $writer.WriteLine\('quit'\)
    Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 500
    $client.Close\(\)
} catch {
    Write-Host "Error: $_"
}

Start-Sleep -Seconds 2
if \(!$proc.HasExited\) { $proc.Kill\(\) }

Write-Host "=== SERIAL ==="
if \(Test-Path $SERIAL\) {
    $content = Get-Content $SERIAL -Raw
    # Show last part with any 'I' characters
    $last = $content.Substring\([Math]::Max\(0, $content.Length - 200\)\)
    Write-Host $last
    Write-Host ""
    $iCount = \($content.ToCharArray\(\) | Where-Object { $_ -eq 'I' }\).Count
    Write-Host "IRQ12 count \(I chars\): $iCount"
}
PSEOF)

Bash(/tmp/test_mouse4.ps1 << 'PSEOF'
$QEMU = 'C:\\Program Files\\qemu\\qemu-system-x86_64.exe'
$BUILD = 'C:\\Users\\user\\Documents\\new\\build'
$SERIAL = "$BUILD\\serial.log"
Remove-Item $SERIAL -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue

$proc = Start-Process -FilePath $QEMU -ArgumentList @\(
    '-bios', "$BUILD\\OVMF.fd",
    '-drive', "file=fat:rw:$BUILD\\esp",
    '-drive', "format=raw,file=$BUILD\\data.img,if=ide,index=1",
    '-m', '256M',
    '-vga', 'std',
    '-serial', "file:$SERIAL",
    '-no-reboot',
    '-display', 'none',
    '-monitor', 'telnet:127.0.0.1:4444,server,nowait'
\) -PassThru

Start-Sleep -Seconds 4

try {
    $client = New-Object System.Net.Sockets.TcpClient\('127.0.0.1', 4444\)
    $stream = $client.GetStream\(\)
    $writer = New-Object System.IO.StreamWriter\($stream\)
    $writer.AutoFlush = $true
    Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 500

    # Send mouse events
    for \($i = 0; $i -lt 5; $i++\) {
        $writer.WriteLine\('mouse_move 10 10'\)
        Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 200
    }
    Start-Sleep -Seconds 2

    $writer.WriteLine\('quit'\)
    Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 500
    $client.Close\(\)
} catch {
    Write-Host "Error: $_"
}

Start-Sleep -Seconds 2
if \(!$proc.HasExited\) { $proc.Kill\(\) }

Write-Host "=== SERIAL ==="
if \(Test-Path $SERIAL\) {
    $content = Get-Content $SERIAL -Raw
    # Extract the last part after kernel boot
    $idx = $content.IndexOf\('M123456OK'\)
    if \($idx -ge 0\) {
        $after = $content.Substring\($idx\)
        Write-Host $after
    } else {
        $last = $content.Substring\([Math]::Max\(0, $content.Length - 300\)\)
        Write-Host $last
    }
}
PSEOF)

Bash(/tmp/check_mouse.ps1 << 'PSEOF'
$f = 'C:\\Users\\user\\Documents\\new\\build\\screen_mouse.ppm'
$bytes = [IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\($f\)
$nlCount = 0; $hdrLen = 0
for \($i = 0; $i -lt $bytes.Length; $i++\) {
    if \($bytes[$i] -eq 10\) { $nlCount++; if \($nlCount -eq 3\) { $hdrLen = $i + 1; break } }
}
$hdr = [Text.Encoding]::ASCII.GetString\($bytes, 0, $hdrLen\)
Write-Host "Header: $\($hdr.Trim\(\)\)"

# Parse dimensions
$lines = $hdr.Trim\(\).Split\("`n"\)
$dims = $lines[1].Split\(' '\)
$w = [int]$dims[0]; $h = [int]$dims[1]
Write-Host "Resolution: ${w}x${h}"

# Check center pixel
$x = [int]\($w/2\); $y = [int]\($h/2\)
$off = $hdrLen + \($y * $w + $x\) * 3
Write-Host "Center \($x,$y\): R=$\($bytes[$off]\) G=$\($bytes[$off+1]\) B=$\($bytes[$off+2]\)"

# Expected cursor pos: should have moved from center \(512,384\) by 200,200 to ~\(712,584\)
# Check if there's a non-bg pixel near expected cursor location
foreach \($pt in @\(@\(512,384\),@\(712,584\),@\(600,500\)\)\) {
    $x = $pt[0]; $y = $pt[1]
    if \($x -lt $w -and $y -lt $h\) {
        $off = $hdrLen + \($y * $w + $x\) * 3
        Write-Host "Pixel\($x,$y\): R=$\($bytes[$off]\) G=$\($bytes[$off+1]\) B=$\($bytes[$off+2]\)"
    }
}
PSEOF)

Bash(/tmp/test_usb.ps1 << 'PSEOF'
$QEMU = 'C:\\Program Files\\qemu\\qemu-system-x86_64.exe'
$BUILD = 'C:\\Users\\user\\Documents\\new\\build'

Remove-Item $SERIAL -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue

$proc = Start-Process -FilePath $QEMU -ArgumentList @\(

    '-drive', "file=fat:rw:$BUILD\\esp",
    '-drive', "format=raw,file=$BUILD\\data.img,if=ide,index=1",
    '-m', '256M',
    '-vga', 'std',
    '-device', 'qemu-xhci',
    '-device', 'usb-mouse',
    '-serial', "file:$SERIAL",

\) -PassThru

Start-Sleep -Seconds 5

try {

    $writer.AutoFlush = $true

    $writer.WriteLine\('screendump build/screen_usb.ppm'\)

    $writer.WriteLine\('quit'\)

    $idx = $content.IndexOf\('M123456OK'\)
    if \($idx -ge 0\) { Write-Host $content.Substring\($idx\) }
    else { Write-Host $content.Substring\([Math]::Max\(0, $content.Length - 300\)\) }
}

Bash(/tmp/test_usb2.ps1 << 'PSEOF'
$QEMU = 'C:\\Program Files\\qemu\\qemu-system-x86_64.exe'
$BUILD = 'C:\\Users\\user\\Documents\\new\\build'
$SERIAL = "$BUILD\\serial.log"
Remove-Item $SERIAL -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue

$proc = Start-Process -FilePath $QEMU -ArgumentList @\(
    '-bios', "$BUILD\\OVMF.fd",
    '-drive', "file=fat:rw:$BUILD\\esp",
    '-drive', "format=raw,file=$BUILD\\data.img,if=ide,index=1",
    '-m', '256M',
    '-vga', 'std',
    '-device', 'qemu-xhci',
    '-device', 'usb-mouse',
    '-serial', "file:$SERIAL",
    '-no-reboot',
    '-monitor', 'telnet:127.0.0.1:4444,server,nowait'
\) -PassThru

Start-Sleep -Seconds 5

try {
    $client = New-Object System.Net.Sockets.TcpClient\('127.0.0.1', 4444\)
    $stream = $client.GetStream\(\)
    $writer = New-Object System.IO.StreamWriter\($stream\)
    $writer.AutoFlush = $true
    Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 500

    # Check what mice exist and select USB mouse
    $writer.WriteLine\('info mice'\)
    Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 500

    # Send larger mouse events to make cursor move noticeably
    for \($i = 0; $i -lt 20; $i++\) {
        $writer.WriteLine\('mouse_move 50 0'\)
        Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 50
    }
    Start-Sleep -Seconds 2

    $writer.WriteLine\('screendump build/screen_usb2.ppm'\)
    Start-Sleep -Seconds 1

    # Read monitor output
    $buf = New-Object byte[] 16384
    $stream.ReadTimeout = 2000
    try {
        $n = $stream.Read\($buf, 0, 16384\)
        $resp = [Text.Encoding]::ASCII.GetString\($buf, 0, $n\)
        foreach \($line in \($resp -split "`n"\)\) {
            if \($line -match 'Mouse'\) { Write-Host $line.Trim\(\) }
        }
    } catch {}

    $writer.WriteLine\('quit'\)
    Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 500
    $client.Close\(\)
} catch {
    Write-Host "Error: $_"
}

Start-Sleep -Seconds 2
if \(!$proc.HasExited\) { $proc.Kill\(\) }

Write-Host ""
Write-Host "=== SERIAL \(post-boot\) ==="
if \(Test-Path $SERIAL\) {
    $content = Get-Content $SERIAL -Raw
    $idx = $content.IndexOf\('M123456OK'\)
    if \($idx -ge 0\) { Write-Host $content.Substring\($idx\) }
}
PSEOF)

Bash(/tmp/test_usb3.ps1 << 'PSEOF'
$QEMU = 'C:\\Program Files\\qemu\\qemu-system-x86_64.exe'

    '-no-reboot',
    '-display', 'none',
    '-monitor', 'telnet:127.0.0.1:4444,server,nowait'
\) -PassThru

Start-Sleep -Seconds 5

try {
    $client = New-Object System.Net.Sockets.TcpClient\('127.0.0.1', 4444\)
    $stream = $client.GetStream\(\)
    $writer = New-Object System.IO.StreamWriter\($stream\)
    $writer.AutoFlush = $true
    Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 500

    # Switch to USB mouse \(index 2 = Mouse #3\)
    $writer.WriteLine\('mouse_set 2'\)
    Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 500

    # Send mouse events
    for \($i = 0; $i -lt 20; $i++\) {
        $writer.WriteLine\('mouse_move 30 0'\)
        Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 50
    }
    Start-Sleep -Seconds 2

    $writer.WriteLine\('screendump build/screen_usb3.ppm'\)
    Start-Sleep -Seconds 1

    $writer.WriteLine\('quit'\)
    Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 500
    $client.Close\(\)
} catch {
    Write-Host "Error: $_"
}

Start-Sleep -Seconds 2
if \(!$proc.HasExited\) { $proc.Kill\(\) }

Write-Host "=== SERIAL ==="
if \(Test-Path $SERIAL\) {
    $content = Get-Content $SERIAL -Raw
    $idx = $content.IndexOf\('M123456OK'\)
    if \($idx -ge 0\) { Write-Host $content.Substring\($idx\) }
}
PSEOF)
